title: Prompt Lifecycle Enhancements (B-series DAG + Commit Tracking)
summary: Extend the Workpack Protocol with two capabilities: (1) B-series bug-fix prompts can declare dependencies via a DAG, enabling parallel execution and proper ordering; (2) each prompt must commit its changes to the bootstrap branch and record branch name and commit SHA in its output.json, with the integration prompt verifying commit existence and file consistency.

prompts.agent_role: Initialize feature branch, verify baseline, read current protocol spec
Design and implement B-series dependency DAG: spec, schemas, templates, linter
Design and implement per-prompt commit tracking: output schema, spec, templates
Extend integration prompt pattern to verify commits and file consistency
V1 gate: compile, test, lint, cross-check all acceptance criteria
